meta.title: Ted Gutierrez - What Investors & Analysts are getting wrong about the OT Market
meta.description:
2024 is a year of reckoning for the OT Cyber market. The dollars that have flowed into this niche market in the past decade are not a good indicator of the future as many investors and analysts are rethinking their strategies. In other words, many have been wrong.

Ted covers two main areas in this session: the analyst and the investor, both inexplicably tied together from opposite ends of the market.

Dollars feed the analysts belief systems and the statements from analysts invite the dollars. Ted analyzes four, detailed cyber improvement use cases alongside historical investment and analyst data sets (more than 5 years) to uncover which product/service segments have underperformed the most.

He then match today's current value of market segments against a backdrop of asset owner demand, macroeconomic conditions, and financial sector data to outline why investment in the sector is forever-changed.

The final focus area is the disconnect in pricing for products across the sector, with vendors chasing unrealistic valuations primarily responsible. And Ted gives some predictions.
